sys_script_fix.description:
NOTE: update in 2.8.4 | 2023-11-06 | STRY0146507 - Certification Failed Test Results - Provided the updates required to keep in product
Release Introduced: 2.6.300
Purpose: This was a performance improvement desinged to set the Top OU for each node of Every Organizational Structure. This script finds all OUs where the Top OU field is not set and sets it for every OU. The first need for this was for DocIntegrator MCOU and allowing the View override to use a different SharePoint site collection.
This was run when created on the 2.6.3 code base. All scripts were updated to manage this field as Org Structures change.
Validation: - After running open list of all Organizational Hierarchy x_153465_discovert_discover_office_hierarchy_list.do - Show the Top OU field "Top OU" - If Any Top OUs are not set, there is an issue - If any OU is walked to the top node of the Org Structre the OU in its Top OU should match the Top OU at each node up and down the tree
The Script will Log will be logged at the start: 'Fix Script - Tasker 2.6.300- Set Top OUs. Number of TopOUs not set - ' + countEmptyTopOUs + '. Setting TopOUs...'
AFTER finished if ALL OUs have a Top OU, the following note will be logged: 'Fix Script - Tasker 2.6.300- All Top (' + countEmptyTopOUs + ') OUs were set correctly by the Fix Script.')
AFTER finished if ANY OUs have an EMPTY Top OU, the following note will be logged: 'Fix Script - Tasker 2.6.300- Found (' + countEmptyTopOUs + ') Top OUs not set. The Fix Script was not able to set (' + afterCountEmptyTopOUs + ') Top OUs.'
If any Errors occurs while processing OUs, the error will be written to the log in this format: Log Level - Error Message - "OU Name:[ouName] - - Error in 'Tasker 2.6.300 Set Top OUs' - exception: " + error
This script can be used to correct any issues with Top OUs for all OUs.
sys_script_fix.name: Tasker 2.6.300 Set Top OUs
